editorialGuidance: Keep the tone concise, professional, and specific.
Lead with user-facing outcomes, shipping milestones, trust wins, and installability improvements.
Demote internal cleanup unless it clearly changes the shipped product.
editorialNotes: v26.5.1000-dev failed release validation and was replaced.
v26.5.1001-dev also failed the Friends Map release smoke case and was replaced.
v26.5.1002-dev passed the Friends Map case, then failed the mobile Friends Details release regression and was replaced.
v26.5.1003-dev covers Settings scroll containment, moving-state transition pause, the atomic Friends detail Map handoff, the synchronous Map commit, and the synchronous mobile Friends surface switch.
v26.5.1004-dev adds the Friends dense interaction layer cache and rebuild-count regression telemetry.
v26.5.1005-dev adds the hidden WebKit timer gap fix so expected hidden renderer throttling does not keep producing false stale-renderer cycles.
v26.5.1006-dev replaces the failed v26.5.1005-dev validation tag with the hidden heartbeat fix plus Desktop E2E server stability so Playwright output cannot reload the app during release validation.
v26.5.1007-dev replaces the failed v26.5.1006-dev validation tag with a CI-specific identity graph benchmark budget while preserving the local layout guard.
v26.5.1008-dev replaces the failed v26.5.1007-dev packaging tag by moving the hidden heartbeat timer threshold into production builds.
v26.5.1009-dev replaces the failed v26.5.1008-dev validation tag by hardening Tauri mock IPC logging and Friends smoke interactions.
